title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Addressed all Claude review findings for suppression re-emergence and nearest-successor diagnostics. Group-directed schema 1.1 signals now use normalized audience identity for suppression matching and remain excluded from person profiles; playbook doctor reuses one discovery result, only recovers snapshot-less suppressions, lazily loads only targeted orphan history, stops scans once targets resolve, and no longer swallows discovery exceptions. Added actor/type/source/locator negative cases, incompatible-successor cases, deterministic tie-break coverage, and audience-directed coverage. Focused tests: 26 passed; full suite: 222 passed; diff check clean. Review workflow remains human-mediated Claude Code prompts only.
open_questions: Should doctor distinguish advisory issues from failures so low_confidence_meeting_date does not force exit 1?
What are the true occurrence dates for the nitesh follow-up, wide-orbit orchestration, fable-5 workflow review, and HTV artifacts?
next_actions: Run the generated Claude Code follow-up review prompt against the current working tree; if accepted, commit and push the diagnostics and review-workflow retirement changes.
continuation_hint: Next: Run the generated Claude Code follow-up review prompt against the current working tree; if accepted, commit and push the diagnostics and review-workflow retirement changes.
